name: google-ads-baby
description: Google Ads campaign management MCP server with two-phase safety confirmations, plus an interim marketing-knowledge store.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Google Ads campaigns through a safe local MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Google Ads MCP server for listing accounts and campaigns, adjusting budgets, changing campaign status, and preparing new Search campaigns, ad groups, and responsive search ads with two-phase safety confirmation. Also wires an interim marketing-knowledge store (memory-bank-mcp) for accumulating per-client and general marketing notes across sessions as plain markdown — point MARKETING_KNOWLEDGE_DIR at a Google Drive / OneDrive-synced folder.
defaultPrompt: Show campaigns for a selected account.
